title: OpenCode session_message.seq FATAL + DCP tokenizer plugin fix
summary: Resolve FATAL NOT NULL constraint failed session_message.seq (blocks all scheduled opencode run jobs on agent/model switch) caused by version skew: installed opencode-ai@1.15.10 predates upstream fix 8bc501b (2026-06-08). DB is healthy (integrity ok, source-of-truth intact) so the fix is a runtime upgrade to v1.17.11, not a DB wipe. Also fix secondary non-fatal DCP plugin load failure (missing @anthropic-ai/tokenizer) by re-resolving the plugin cache to 3.1.14. Plan rewritten by 01-Planner (peer review) for maximum executability: 27 atomic CLI-verified tasks across 7 phases (0=preflight, 1=baseline, 2=upgrade, 3=seq-validate, 4=dcp-fix, 5=harden, 6=close).
keyOutcomes: Root-caused the FATAL as upstream issue #31204 (session.next.agent.switched -> appendMessage omits seq) on a pre-fix runtime (1.15.10).
Proved the DB is not corrupt (integrity_check ok) and source-of-truth tables are intact -> upgrade-only recovery, no data loss.
Identified secondary DCP plugin error as a stale cache pin (3.1.13) missing @anthropic-ai/tokenizer; fixable by cache re-resolve to 3.1.14.
risks: Upgrading the runtime while a live opencode session/scheduler holds the DB can cause WAL/SHM contention or partial migration.
Both an npm-global and a standalone opencode copy exist; leaving them on divergent versions can re-introduce skew.
DCP 3.1.14 may still not bundle @anthropic-ai/tokenizer (manifest bug); fallback is a manual npm install of the tokenizer into the plugin node_modules.
validationCriteria: AC-1: opencode --version reports 1.17.x and matches npm ls -g + standalone copy (seq-fix-precheck-20260628.txt as evidence)
AC-2: A fresh 'opencode run --agent plan' probe returns exit 0 with PING in output (seq-fix-probe-20260628.json)
AC-3: New session_message rows from the probe have non-null seq (python sqlite3 probe in Phase 3.3)
AC-4: Post-fix log scan finds zero 'session_message.seq' or '@anthropic-ai/tokenizer' matches (seq-fix-final-validated.txt)
AC-5: DCP plugin loads (Test-Path for tokenizer in node_modules is True) and no 'failed to load plugin' in latest log
AC-6: opencode.db backup exists with SHA256 + size proof; post-upgrade PRAGMA integrity_check = ok
AC-7: Scheduled task 'opencode-job-development-88876ee600f5-knowledge-base-ingest' returns State = Ready
AC-8: metadata.json status=completed, progress.percentage=100; tracks.md row=complete; execution-log.md has 'Execution Complete' section
